reason: Irreconcilable conflict between behavior_in_task_description and no_solution_leakage/instruction_no_hint_leakage. Tests are purely text-based (solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text both fail) — they assert exact source code strings like 'badge?: React.ReactNode;', 'dropdown-menu-item__badge', and 'badge={<DropdownMenu.Item.Badge>AI</DropdownMenu.Item.Badge>}'. These strings ARE the implementation, so including them in the instruction (required by behavior_in_task_description) necessarily leaks the solution (violating no_solution_leakage and instruction_no_hint_leakage). The tests need rewrite, not the instruction.
